---
title: "Allan Almaraz"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;1,9..40,400&display=swap');

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

body {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif !important;
  background: #111 !important;
  color: #f5f5f5;
  font-size: 16px !important;
}

#quarto-header,
.navbar,
#quarto-sidebar,
#quarto-toc-toggle,
#quarto-margin-sidebar,
footer.footer {
  display: none !important;
}

#quarto-content,
.page-layout-custom,
main.content {
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  gap: 0 !important;
}

.portfolio-shell { display: flex; height: 100vh; overflow: hidden; align-items: stretch; }

.sidebar {
  width: 250px;
  min-width: 250px;
  background: #111;
  border-right: 0.5px solid #1f1f1f;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  padding: 3rem 1.6rem 1.75rem;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  height: 100vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.sidebar-photo { width: 180px; height: 180px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center 20%; border: 2px solid #2a2a2a; margin: 0 auto 2rem; display: block; }

.sidebar-name {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #f5f5f5;
  margin-bottom: 3px;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.sidebar-credential {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #60a5fa;
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
  margin-bottom: 2px;
}

.sidebar-avail {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #f5f5f5;
  margin-bottom: 2px;
}

.sidebar-grad {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #f5f5f5;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.sidebar-nav {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
}

.sidebar-nav a {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 9px;
  padding: 7px 10px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #f5f5f5;
  transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
}

.sidebar-nav a:hover {
  background: #1a1a1a;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

.sidebar-nav a.active {
  background: #1e3a5f;
}

.nav-pip {
  width: 3px;
  min-width: 3px;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  background: transparent;
}

.sidebar-nav a.active .nav-pip {
  background: #60a5fa;
}

.sidebar-rule {
  border: none;
  border-top: 0.5px solid #2a2a2a;
  margin: 1.6rem 0 1.2rem;
}

.sidebar-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 7px;
  margin-top: 0;
}

.sidebar-links a {
  font-size: 14px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: #f5f5f5;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}

.sidebar-links a:hover { color: #aaaaaa; }

.main-content { flex: 1; background: #ffffff; padding: 2.75rem 2.75rem 3rem; min-height: 100vh; max-height: 100vh; overflow-y: auto; color: #111; }

.main-content * {
  font-size: 16px !important;
}

.eyebrow {
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #60a5fa;
  letter-spacing: 1.2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
}

.headline {
  font-size: 31px !important;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #111;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.3px;
}

.intro { font-size: 16px !important; color: #444; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 2rem; }

.nav-cards {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.nav-card {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 7px 24px;
  background: #111;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}

.nav-card:hover { background: #333; }

.nav-card-title {
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #fff !important;
  margin: 0;
}

.rule-bold {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1.5px solid #111;
  margin: 0 0 1.5rem;
}

.label-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.label-text {
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #111;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.body-col { flex: 1; font-size: 16px !important; color: #444; line-height: 1.4; }

.resume-btns {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.btn-dark {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 7px 14px;
  background: #111;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 500;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.btn-dark:hover { background: #333; }

.btn-outline {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 7px 14px;
  background: #111;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 500;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border: 0.5px solid #111;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: #333; border-color: #333; }

.targets-wrap {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

.target-box {
  flex: 1;
  border: 0.5px solid #e8e8e8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  background: #fafafa;
}

.target-box-head {
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #60a5fa;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.target-item { font-size: 14px !important; color: #444; padding: 0.3rem 0; border-bottom: 0.5px solid #f0f0f0; line-height: 1.4; text-align: left; }

.target-item:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}
</style>

<div class="portfolio-shell">

  <aside class="sidebar">
    <img
      src="images/Headshot1.jpg"
      alt="Allan Almaraz"
      class="sidebar-photo"
      onerror="this.style.display='none'"
    >
    <div class="sidebar-name">Allan Almaraz</div>
    <div class="sidebar-credential">MSBA · UC Irvine</div>
    <div class="sidebar-avail">Available June 2026</div>
    <div class="sidebar-grad">Graduating August 2026</div>

    <nav class="sidebar-nav">
      <a href="index.html" class="active">
        <span class="nav-pip"></span>Home
      </a>
      <a href="about.html">
        <span class="nav-pip"></span>About Me
      </a>
      <a href="experience.html">
        <span class="nav-pip"></span>Experience
      </a>
      <a href="projects.html">
        <span class="nav-pip"></span>Projects
      </a>
    </nav>

    <hr class="sidebar-rule">

    <div class="sidebar-links">
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/allanalmaraz/" target="_blank">LinkedIn →</a>
      <a href="files/resume_analytics.pdf" target="_blank">Analytics Resume →</a>
      <a href="files/resume_highered.pdf" target="_blank">Higher Ed Resume →</a>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <main class="main-content">

    <div class="eyebrow">Welcome</div>
    <div class="headline">Hello, I'm Allan.</div>
    <div class="intro">
      I am a first-generation graduate student pursuing my Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA) at the University of California, Irvine (UCI), with a passion for using data to inform decisions and drive meaningful change. This is my professional portfolio, where you can explore who I am, my experience, and the projects I have worked on.
    </div>

    <div class="nav-cards">
      <a class="nav-card" href="about.html">
        <div class="nav-card-title">About Me</div>
      </a>
      <a class="nav-card" href="experience.html">
        <div class="nav-card-title">Experience</div>
      </a>
      <a class="nav-card" href="projects.html">
        <div class="nav-card-title">Projects</div>
      </a>
    </div>

    <hr class="rule-bold">

    <div class="label-row">
      <div class="label-col"><div class="label-text">Mission</div></div>
      <div class="body-col">
        I believe data has the power to move organizations forward. My goal is to work for the kinds of companies that show up in people's everyday lives, the brands they eat at, wear, root for, and learn from. I find purpose in knowing that my analysis could shape how these organizations make decisions, and that the results would be visible in the world around me. Whether supporting a restaurant brand, an apparel company, or a university, I want to be the analyst who turns complex data into decisions that actually change how things are done.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-btns">
      <a href="files/resume_analytics.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn-dark">Analytics Resume</a>
      <a href="files/resume_highered.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">Higher Ed Resume</a>
    </div>

    <hr class="rule-bold">

    <div class="label-row">
      <div class="label-col"><div class="label-text">Goals</div></div>
      <div class="body-col">
        Through my MSBA program and professional experience, I have built a growing toolkit centered on data analysis and business strategy. My goal is to bring that toolkit to companies that people interact with every day, where the work of an analyst is connected to something real and tangible. By deepening my expertise in SQL, Python, Tableau, and Power BI, I want to bridge the analytical and strategic sides of a business. The MSBA program is structured to allow me to begin full-time work in June 2026 while completing my degree in August, and I am actively pursuing entry-level analyst roles in financial, marketing, and business analytics. The specific roles, industries, and regions I am targeting are below.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="targets-wrap">
      <div class="target-box">
        <div class="target-box-head">Target Roles</div>
        <div class="target-item">Financial Analyst</div>
        <div class="target-item">Budget Analyst</div>
        <div class="target-item">Marketing Analyst</div>
        <div class="target-item">Supply Chain Analyst</div>
        <div class="target-item">Business Strategy Analyst</div>
      </div>
      <div class="target-box">
        <div class="target-box-head">Target Industries</div>
        <div class="target-item">Restaurant &amp; Food Service</div>
        <div class="target-item">Higher Education</div>
        <div class="target-item">Local Government</div>
        <div class="target-item">Consumer Packaged Goods</div>
        <div class="target-item">Apparel</div>
      </div>
      <div class="target-box">
        <div class="target-box-head">Target Regions</div>
        <div class="target-item">Ventura County</div>
        <div class="target-item">Santa Barbara County</div>
        <div class="target-item">Sacramento County</div>
        <div class="target-item">Orange County</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </main>
</div>
```
